Built and launched PrivacyLint today — a SwiftSyntax-based CLI that catches App Store privacy rejections (ITMS-91053 missing API declaration, ITMS-91061 missing SDK manifest, undeclared tracking, AI consent gaps) before you submit.

Smoke-tested it on IceCubesApp, the popular open-source Mastodon client — found a real missing PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy. PR is open with the fix.

Open source, MIT, brew installable. Read the ITMS-91053 walkthrough → [BLOG_URL]
